title: premna serratifolia var. minor
intro: Premna serratifolia var. minor, also known as the small-leaved Premna, is a variant of the Premna serratifolia plant, a species of flowering plant in the mint family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits such as antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Premna serratifolia var. minor can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and alleviate respiratory problems.
